column1: # description: BIS LBS: Total liabilities to China

column10: note

Total foreign bank obligations to ALL Chinese counterparties, ALL instruments. Includes loans, bonds, equity, trade finance, swap lines, etc. NOT specific to interbank deposits. NOT the correct series for SLR transmission hypothesis.
